name: HoneyBOT
description: HoneyBOT (Honeypot). Tool: http://www.atomicsoftwaresolutions.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #519 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map HoneyBOT output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved HoneyBOT output file to parse instead of running it live.
